description: Visual thinking tools for brainstorming, organizing ideas, exploring concepts, and clustering topics using radial and hierarchical layouts

knowledge.name: Design Philosophy
knowledge.description: Why mind maps exist, cognitive principles (Dual Coding, Gestalt, Von Restorff, Cognitive Load), visual design principles, and the designer's mindset

knowledge.name: Layout Patterns
knowledge.description: Five layout patterns (Classic Radial, Hemispheric, Cluster Cloud, Vertical Cascade, Dual-Core) with ASCII diagrams, spatial rules, and scaling guidelines

knowledge.name: Visual Guide
knowledge.description: Four color palettes with hex codes, typography scale, element selection guide, icon system, dark/light mode, and WCAG accessibility guidelines

knowledge.name: Content Guide
knowledge.description: Essential sections, content volume guidelines, real-world examples, copywriting rules, and content templates per mind map type

knowledge.name: Build Process
knowledge.description: Six-phase workflow (Discovery, Structure, Skeleton, Content, Polish, Review) with Miro API pseudo-code and quality checklists

knowledge.name: Examples Reference
knowledge.description: Six detailed example breakdowns, four anti-patterns, before/after transformations, and design elements to steal

knowledge.name: Variations
knowledge.description: Industry adaptations, team size scaling, complexity levels, cultural considerations, and cross-board integration mappings

templates.name: Brainstorming Board
templates.description: Radial ideation board with six branches for generating and voting on ideas around a central topic

templates.name: Concept Map
templates.description: Hierarchical knowledge map connecting concepts with labeled relationships for deep understanding

templates.name: Idea Exploration
templates.description: Structured canvas for expanding a single idea through lenses of feasibility, impact, risks, and next steps

templates.name: Topic Clustering
templates.description: Affinity mapping board for grouping related items into themed clusters with priority ranking
